note: Autopilot state. 'consumed' is keyed by zip path relative to ~/Desktop/Awwwards Components. Do not hand-edit while the loop is running.

Awwwards Pack 4/Text Animations/5/code.z.reason: On-scroll variable-font typography demo -> de-animated into a static serif drop cap.

added_features.title: Editorial drop cap on the About lede
added_features.note: Static serif ::first-letter drop cap (ink, ~2 lines, mobile override at 480px). No motion, no new libs. Verified in Playwright at 1440 + 390: no horizontal scroll, no console errors, no regression on index/capabilities.
